subject: Testing: Unit tests for event parsers
description:
Write comprehensive unit tests for event parsing logic.

Dependencies: Task 9 complete (parsers implemented)

Files: internal/cli/events_test.go

Test coverage:
1. Valid events for each type
2. Malformed JSON
3. Missing required fields
4. Invalid field values
5. Edge cases (empty arrays, null values)
6. Type discrimination (tool denial vs AskUserQuestion)

Pattern: Table-driven tests with subtests

Deliverable:
- Test suite with >80% coverage for events.go
- Fixtures in testdata/ directory
- Benchmarks for parser performance (optional)

Acceptance:
- [ ] All event types have parser tests
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] go test -cover shows >80%
- [ ] Tests follow go.md conventions (t.Helper(), table-driven)
- [ ] No flaky tests
